body: PolicyEngine-UK 2.88.56 pre-CTR parameter and wrapper snapshot for PE-parity surfaces. Business rates revenue parameters are England 27222000000, Scotland 2123000000, Wales 1053499000, and Northern Ireland 1334000000, for total 31732499000. For the 2026 PolicyEngine year, National Minimum Wage hourly rates are apprentice 8.00, under 18 8.00, ages 18 to 20 10.85, and ages 21 and over 12.71. PolicyEngine UK maternity_allowance delegates to maternity_allowance_reported without additional computation. Generated parameter JSON: {"business_rates_revenue": {"ENGLAND": 27222000000.0, "NORTHERN_IRELAND": 1334000000.0, "SCOTLAND": 2123000000.0, "TOTAL": 31732499000.0, "WALES": 1053499000.0}, "minimum_wage_rates": {"age_18_to_20": 10.850000381469727, "age_21_and_over": 12.710000038146973, "apprentice": 8.0, "under_18": 8.0}}
